message:
chore: remove dead code — unused label functions and coordinator config field (bd-1yv)

- cli_app.rs: remove ballast_command_label() and config_command_label()
  which were defined but never called
- coordinator.rs: remove unused `config` field from BallastPoolCoordinator
  (was stored but never accessed via self.config)
